title: Dirty Oil Flows
summary:
Main
Tanker - Weekly Market Monitor
Snapshot of Crude and Product Freight Rates, Supply-Demand
Week 05, January 30, 2025
This week's focus centres on comparing the evolution of dirty oil from the Arabian Gulf (AG) to the Far East and the growth of tonne days. January closed with weakening momentum in the dirty freight market, as the growth rate of demand tonne-days has yet to support a notable recovery. However, there are encouraging signs on the supply side, with vessel availability in the Arabian Gulf (AG) trending downward.
